revision.comment: Starting out this category handler template.
More robust to use numbered instead of unnamed parameters for {{cat handle/numbered}}.
Added blacklist check.
Added some code comments.
Protected Template:Cat handle: This is a meta-template that we will use in lots of templates. ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Adding {{pp-template}}, since now protected.
Adding "project" as alias for "wikipedia" namespace. Just like "image" is already an alias for "file".
moved [[Template:Cat handle]] to [[Template:Cat handler]]: Better name with clearer meaning, as suggested by Willscrlt.
Update calls to subtemplates /numbered and /blacklist, due to move.
Using a #switch-case for the blacklist check, to make it easier to add more blacklist functions in the future.
Making this template backwards compatible by adding support for "categories=no/yes", to ease deployment.
Adding a code comment.
Adding support for "category=empty/no/not defined/¬/yes" for backwards compatibility, to ease deployment. Unfortunately bloating the code.
More efficient code for the "category" parameter. No change in functionality.
Blacklist check moved outside {{/numbered}}. Added "basic usage check", so parameter 1 can behave normally when advanced usage. Added the evil "all" parameter that categorizes in all namespaces.

Changed protection level of Template:Cat handler: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]]: i've started deploying this template (hope it's not premature) ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Adding "subpage=no/only".
Adding "category2 =" support, to work around the "category" parameter name collision. Keeping "category =" support for some hours while fixing any usage out there.
Should be "category2" in two more places.
Removing faulty "category =" support. (I have checked and fixed the usage out there.)
Updating to handle the new "Book:" namespace.
"Book" needed to be added in one more place.
remove {{pp-template}}
moved [[Template:Cat handler]] to [[Template:Category handler]]: expand name
avoid redirects
switch to Lua version
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Category handler: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allow template editors to edit ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Category handler]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3220785]])
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3225264]])
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Category handler]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:34:38
More robust to use numbered instead of unnamed parameters for {{cat handle/numbered}}.
Added blacklist check.
Added some code comments.
Adding {{pp-template}}, since now protected.
Adding "project" as alias for "wikipedia" namespace. Just like "image" is already an alias for "file".
Update calls to subtemplates /numbered and /blacklist, due to move.
Using a #switch-case for the blacklist check, to make it easier to add more blacklist functions in the future.
Making this template backwards compatible by adding support for "categories=no/yes", to ease deployment.
Adding a code comment.
Adding support for "category=empty/no/not defined/¬/yes" for backwards compatibility, to ease deployment. Unfortunately bloating the code.
More efficient code for the "category" parameter. No change in functionality.
Blacklist check moved outside {{/numbered}}. Added "basic usage check", so parameter 1 can behave normally when advanced usage. Added the evil "all" parameter that categorizes in all namespaces.
Adding "subpage=no/only".
Adding "category2 =" support, to work around the "category" parameter name collision. Keeping "category =" support for some hours while fixing any usage out there.
Should be "category2" in two more places.
Removing faulty "category =" support. (I have checked and fixed the usage out there.)
Updating to handle the new "Book:" namespace.
"Book" needed to be added in one more place.
remove {{pp-template}}
avoid redirects
switch to Lua version
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:38:54 on [[Template:Category handler]]
More robust to use numbered instead of unnamed parameters for {{cat handle/numbered}}.
Added blacklist check.
Added some code comments.
Adding {{pp-template}}, since now protected.
Adding "project" as alias for "wikipedia" namespace. Just like "image" is already an alias for "file".
Update calls to subtemplates /numbered and /blacklist, due to move.
Using a #switch-case for the blacklist check, to make it easier to add more blacklist functions in the future.
Making this template backwards compatible by adding support for "categories=no/yes", to ease deployment.
Adding a code comment.
Adding support for "category=empty/no/not defined/¬/yes" for backwards compatibility, to ease deployment. Unfortunately bloating the code.
More efficient code for the "category" parameter. No change in functionality.
Blacklist check moved outside {{/numbered}}. Added "basic usage check", so parameter 1 can behave normally when advanced usage. Added the evil "all" parameter that categorizes in all namespaces.

Changed protection level of Template:Cat handler: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]]: i've started deploying this template (hope it's not premature) ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Adding "subpage=no/only".
Adding "category2 =" support, to work around the "category" parameter name collision. Keeping "category =" support for some hours while fixing any usage out there.
Should be "category2" in two more places.
Removing faulty "category =" support. (I have checked and fixed the usage out there.)
Updating to handle the new "Book:" namespace.
"Book" needed to be added in one more place.
remove {{pp-template}}
avoid redirects
switch to Lua version
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

Adding "project" as alias for "wikipedia" namespace. Just like "image" is already an alias for "file".

Update calls to subtemplates /numbered and /blacklist, due to move.
Using a #switch-case for the blacklist check, to make it easier to add more blacklist functions in the future.
Making this template backwards compatible by adding support for "categories=no/yes", to ease deployment.
Adding a code comment.

More efficient code for the "category" parameter. No change in functionality.
Blacklist check moved outside {{/numbered}}. Added "basic usage check", so parameter 1 can behave normally when advanced usage. Added the evil "all" parameter that categorizes in all namespaces.
Adding "subpage=no/only".
Adding "category2 =" support, to work around the "category" parameter name collision. Keeping "category =" support for some hours while fixing any usage out there.
Should be "category2" in two more places.
Removing faulty "category =" support. (I have checked and fixed the usage out there.)
Updating to handle the new "Book:" namespace.

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:Category_handler]]: Importing Template
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Category handler]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_handler here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_handler for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#invoke:Category handler|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
